## Description / Excerpt

A substrate-level framework describing living systems as energy throughput systems whose cognition, culture, affect, stories, and ethics route energy through recursive loops.

Excerpt:

## 1. Primitive Assumption All systems are **energy throughput systems**. - Energy is **inbound** (solar → chemical → biological → stored → released). - No agent generates energy; agents **permit, receive, store, release, allocate, and route** it. - Intake ("receive") is **gated*
